help.intro: Welcome to {botname} help menu! Use the buttons below to navigate through the different modules and commands available. You can also use {prefix}help <command> to get more information about a specific command.
help.footer: Use {prefix}help <command> to get more information about a command.
help.notFound: No command or module found with the name '{query}'.

tags.tagsPruned: The tags on this server were pruned.
tags.tagListEmpty: No tags have been created in this server yet.
tags.tagNameTooLong: The tag name is too long.
tags.tagNameTooShort: The tag name is too short.
tags.tagNameReserved: Invalid tag name, this name is reserved for another subcommand.
tags.noTags: There aren't any tags in this server.
tags.confirmPrune:
Are you sure that you want to delete **ALL** tags in this server?
This is an irreversible action.

success.memberTimedOut: {member} has been timed out for **{duration}** seconds!

errors.unauthorized: You don't have authorization to execute this action.
errors.invalidEmoji: That is not a valid emoji.
errors.emojiLimitReached: The emoji limit has been reached for this server.
errors.invalidLanguage: The specified language is not supported.
errors.invalidLanguageHint: Use **`/languageslist`** to see the available languages.
errors.prefixTooLong: The prefix is too long. Please choose a prefix with less than {max} characters.
errors.noDM: This command cannot be used in direct messages.
errors.roleIsAboveMine: That role position is above my highest role position.
errors.autorolesLimitReached: You can only have up to 2 autoroles for {userType}.
errors.noRolesSet: No roles have been set yet.
errors.roleIsAboveMineHint: Role must be below bot's highest role
errors.autoroleAlreadyExistsHint: This role is already an autorole
errors.autoroleNotFoundHint: This role is not in autoroles
errors.tagNotFoundHint: Use /tag list to see all tags
errors.noTags: No tags found in this server.
errors.cantActionYourself: You can't perform this action on yourself.
errors.cantActionMe: You can't perform this action on me.
errors.cantActionHigherRole: You can't perform this action on someone with a higher role than me.
errors.cantActionHigherRoleHint: Try moving my role higher in the role hierarchy.
errors.cantActionOwner: You can't perform this action on the server owner.
errors.cantActionAdmin: You can't perform this action on an administrator.
errors.memberAlreadyTimedOut: This member is already timed out.
errors.memberNotTimedOut: This member is not timed out.
errors.timeoutDurationInvalidHint: Must be between 1 second and 28 days
errors.clearAmountInvalid: The amount of messages to clear is invalid.
errors.viewNotForYou: This action is not for you.

add.success: A reminder for {date} ({relative}) has been set successfully!
add.invalid_time:
Invalid time format
Valid examples:
• Relative: `30s`, `30m`, `2h`, `1d`, `1w`, `1mo`, `1y`
• Combined: `1d12h`, `2w3d`
• Absolute: `2025-02-10 15:30`, `15:30`
add.future_only: The time must be in the future
add.limit_reached: You have reached the maximum number of reminders (10). Please delete some before adding new ones.
add.no_permissions: I don't have permission to send messages in {channel}. Please choose a different channel or grant me the necessary permissions.

list.title: Your reminders
list.empty: You have dont have any reminders

remove.success: The reminder has been removed successfully!
remove.not_found: The reminder with ID `{id}` was not found.
remove.invalid_id: The provided ID is invalid. Please provide a valid reminder ID.
remove.not_owner: You can't remove a reminder that you don't own.

edit.not_found: The reminder with ID `{id}` was not found!
edit.already_completed: You can't edit a completed reminder!
edit.no_fields: You must provide the time or the message!
edit.not_owner: You can't edit other people's reminders

prune.confirmPrune:
Are you sure that you want to delete **ALL** of your reminders?
This is an irreversible action.

timezone.info_text: Now times like `15:30` will be interpreted in your timezone.
timezone.invalid:
Invalid timezone provided!
Examples: America/New_York, Europe/London, UTC
